description: A financial data server providing access to company financial statements, stock prices, cryptocurrency prices, and market news for investment research and analysis.

tools.name: get_income_statements
tools.description: Retrieves income statements for a publicly traded company, including revenue, net income, and earnings per share data.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company to retrieve data for (e.g., "AAPL", "MSFT").

period.description: The reporting period frequency for financial statements: "annual" for yearly reports or "quarterly" for quarterly reports.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company for which data was retrieved.

period.description: The reporting period frequency of the returned financial statements.

statements.description: A list of income statement records for the specified company and period.

date.description: The reporting date of the income statement in YYYY-MM-DD format.

revenue.description: Total revenue generated by the company during the reporting period.

net_income.description: Net income (profit after all expenses) for the reporting period.

eps.description: Earnings per share, calculated as net income divided by outstanding shares.

tools.name: get_balance_sheets
tools.description: Retrieves balance sheet data for a publicly traded company, including assets, liabilities, and shareholders' equity.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company to retrieve data for (e.g., "AAPL", "MSFT").

period.description: The reporting period frequency for financial statements: "annual" for yearly reports or "quarterly" for quarterly reports.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company for which data was retrieved.

period.description: The reporting period frequency of the returned financial statements.

statements.description: A list of balance sheet records for the specified company and period.

date.description: The reporting date of the balance sheet in YYYY-MM-DD format.

total_assets.description: Total value of all assets owned by the company.

total_liabilities.description: Total value of all liabilities owed by the company.

shareholders_equity.description: Total shareholders' equity, representing the net worth of the company (assets minus liabilities).

tools.name: get_cash_flow_statements
tools.description: Retrieves cash flow statements for a publicly traded company, detailing operating, investing, and financing cash flows.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company to retrieve data for (e.g., "AAPL", "MSFT").

period.description: The reporting period frequency for financial statements: "annual" for yearly reports or "quarterly" for quarterly reports.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company for which data was retrieved.

period.description: The reporting period frequency of the returned financial statements.

statements.description: A list of cash flow statement records for the specified company and period.

date.description: The reporting date of the cash flow statement in YYYY-MM-DD format.

operating_cash_flow.description: Cash generated or used by core business operations.

investing_cash_flow.description: Cash generated or used by investment activities such as asset purchases or sales.

financing_cash_flow.description: Cash generated or used by financing activities such as debt or equity transactions.

net_change_in_cash.description: The net change in cash position during the reporting period.

tools.name: get_current_stock_price
tools.description: Retrieves the current real-time stock price and daily change information for a publicly traded company.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company to retrieve data for (e.g., "AAPL", "MSFT").
The stock ticker symbol of the company for which data was retrieved.

price.description: The current trading price of the stock.

currency.description: The currency in which the price is denominated (e.g., "USD").

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the price quote in ISO 8601 format.

change.description: The absolute price change from the previous trading day's close.

change_percent.description: The percentage price change from the previous trading day's close.

tools.name: get_historical_stock_prices
tools.description: Retrieves historical stock price data (OHLCV) for a publicly traded company over a specified date range.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company to retrieve data for (e.g., "AAPL", "MSFT").

start_date.description: The start date for the historical data range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: The end date for the historical data range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

interval.description: The time interval between data points: "1d" for daily, "1w" for weekly, or "1m" for monthly.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company for which data was retrieved.

prices.description: A list of historical price records (OHLCV) for the specified date range and interval.

date.description: The date of the price record in YYYY-MM-DD format.

open.description: The opening price at the start of the trading period.

high.description: The highest price reached during the trading period.

low.description: The lowest price reached during the trading period.

close.description: The closing price at the end of the trading period.

volume.description: The total number of shares traded during the period.

tools.name: get_company_news
tools.description: Retrieves recent news articles related to a publicly traded company.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company to retrieve data for (e.g., "AAPL", "MSFT").

limit.description: The maximum number of news articles to return.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company for which data was retrieved.

news.description: A list of news articles related to the specified company.

title.description: The headline or title of the news article.

url.description: The URL link to the full news article.

published_at.description: The publication timestamp of the article in ISO 8601 format.

source.description: The name of the news source or publisher.

tools.name: get_available_stock_tickers
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all available stock ticker symbols supported by the financial data service.

symbols.description: A list of all available stock ticker symbols (e.g., ["AAPL", "MSFT", "GOOGL"]).

tools.name: get_available_crypto_tickers
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all available cryptocurrency ticker symbols supported by the financial data service.

tickers.description: A list of all available cryptocurrency ticker symbols (e.g., ["BTC", "ETH", "USDT"]).

tools.name: get_historical_crypto_prices
tools.description: Retrieves historical price data (OHLCV) for a cryptocurrency over a specified date range.

ticker.description: The cryptocurrency ticker symbol to retrieve data for (e.g., "BTC", "ETH").

start_date.description: The start date for the historical data range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: The end date for the historical data range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

interval.description: The time interval between data points: "1d" for daily, "1w" for weekly, or "1m" for monthly.

ticker.description: The cryptocurrency ticker symbol for which data was retrieved.

prices.description: A list of historical price records (OHLCV) for the specified date range and interval.

date.description: The date of the price record in YYYY-MM-DD format.

open.description: The opening price at the start of the trading period.

high.description: The highest price reached during the trading period.

low.description: The lowest price reached during the trading period.

close.description: The closing price at the end of the trading period.

volume.description: The total trading volume during the period.

tools.name: get_current_crypto_price
tools.description: Retrieves the current real-time price and daily change information for a cryptocurrency.

ticker.description: The cryptocurrency ticker symbol to retrieve data for (e.g., "BTC", "ETH").
The cryptocurrency ticker symbol for which data was retrieved.

price.description: The current trading price of the cryptocurrency.

currency.description: The currency in which the price is denominated (e.g., "USD").

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the price quote in ISO 8601 format.

change.description: The absolute price change from the previous day's close.

change_percent.description: The percentage price change from the previous day's close.
